prompt: Create a vertical high-fashion fine-art portrait of a young East Asian woman seated in a dark studio, turned three-quarters away but looking back toward the camera with a calm, melancholic expression. She has short glossy black bob hair with straight bangs, pale luminous skin, subtle red lips, and delicate makeup. Dress her in an off-shoulder black kimono-inspired gown with translucent lace sleeves embroidered with pale beige cherry blossoms, exposing one shoulder and upper back, with the fabric flowing downward into deep shadow. The composition is moody and centered slightly low, with her face in the lower middle-left area and her body forming an elegant curved silhouette. Behind her, place exactly 3 large black folding fans: one open fan radiating upward behind her head and right shoulder, one darker fan near the lower left behind her skirt, and one partially hidden fan on the right side. Add exactly 4 visible clusters of pale blossoms: one large cluster at the top center inside the circular halo, one medium cluster just above her shoulder, one small cluster to her right near the fan, and one cluster embroidered on the lower sleeve. Use a nearly black background with a large imperfect gold crescent-ring halo behind the upper body, broken metallic leaf texture, charcoal gray torn-paper patches, faint botanical line drawings, wisps of gold filigree, and sparse dust-like speckles. Lighting should be low-key and cinematic, with soft directional illumination on her face, shoulder, and flowers, while the edges fall into rich black. Visual style: Japanese gothic elegance, dark floral editorial photography, painterly mixed-media collage, luxurious black-and-gold palette, muted beige flowers, ultra-detailed fabric texture, shallow depth, dramatic negative space, no text, no watermark.
